Debounce Enable

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x48
Size:
0x4
Source:
gpio_rf.rdl

Description

Enables debounce logic per Port A pin. A signal must remain stable for two debounce-clock cycles to be recognized. 0=no debounce, 1=debounce enabled.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:0] debounce rw 0x0 DEBOUNCE

Field Descriptions

debounce - DEBOUNCE

0=disabled, 1=enabled
